data.body:
## Description

**What**: Docker-based test environment and E2E test harness for running workflow integration tests
**Why**: DSO's workflow bugs (34 fix commits/month) only manifest when the full script chain executes in sequence — no existing test exercises this. A Docker environment matching CI provides a deterministic execution context.
**Scope**:
- IN: Dockerfile (Ubuntu, git, Python, ruff, pre-commit, no global git config), GitHub Actions E2E workflow, test runner with structured diagnostic output, DSO_E2E_MODE=1 bypass in review gate, test gate, and ticket gate
- OUT: Actual test scenarios (Stories 2-5), LLM/Claude Code runtime simulation

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, a Dockerfile builds an Ubuntu-based image matching CI runner versions (git, Python) with ruff and pre-commit installed, and no HOME-level gitconfig
  ← Satisfies: "A Dockerfile produces an Ubuntu-based test environment matching CI"
- When this story is complete, a dedicated GitHub Actions workflow (e2e.yml) runs the E2E test suite on push to main
  ← Satisfies: "Tests run in CI only via a dedicated GitHub Actions workflow"
- When this story is complete, DSO_E2E_MODE=1 causes pre-commit-review-gate.sh, pre-commit-test-gate.sh, and pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh to exit 0 unconditionally, while non-LLM hooks (format-and-lint, executable-guard) execute normally using tooling in the Docker image
  ← Satisfies: "LLM-dependent hooks bypassed via DSO_E2E_MODE=1"
- When this story is complete, test failures produce structured diagnostic output: step name, expected vs actual state, git log at failure point, and ticket state dump
  ← Satisfies: "Structured diagnostic output on failure"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Docker env must match CI precisely — version drift between Dockerfile and CI runner causes false positives/negatives
- [Reliability] Dockerfile must include ruff and pre-commit since merge-to-main.sh sources ensure-pre-commit.sh and format-and-lint hook invokes ruff
- [Testing] DSO_E2E_MODE bypass must be narrowly scoped — bypassing too much hides real hook bugs
